The build failed during the verification phase. Here is my analysis of what
went wrong and whether we should retry.

Looking at the logs {note: the failure was in the test harness}, the root
cause is clear. Below is my structured verdict.

```json
{
  // The retry advisor's verdict — emitted inline instead of to the output file
  'should_retry': True,
  'diagnosis': "The integration test failed because the DB migration wasn't applied before the suite ran",
  'strategy': 'Run alembic upgrade head in the setup step, then re-run the suite',
  'modified_context': 'Ensure migrations run before tests; the previous attempt skipped this step',
  'confidence': 0.82,
}
```

Let me know if you need any more detail on the diagnosis.
